Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "DONALDDUCKSPLAYGROUND-0811" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Donald Duck's Playground.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen is from the disk version
